sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date DateTime, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toLastDayOfWeek(event_date) AS last_day, value / (CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE value END) AS normalized_value FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, value / (toLastDayOfWeek(event_date) - toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00')) AS division_result FROM test_dates WHERE toLastDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT avg(value) / (toLastDayOfWeek(toDateTime(event_date), 0) - toLastDayOfWeek(toDateTime('2023-06-10 00:00:00'))) AS average_division FROM test_dates GROUP BY id HAVING average_division > 0;
SELECT id, event_date, toLastDayOfWeek(event_date, 0) AS last_saturday FROM test_dates WHERE toLastDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) >= '2023-04-22' ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT id, SUM(value) AS total_value, toLastDayOfWeek(event_date) AS week_end FROM test_dates GROUP BY week_end HAVING total_value / COUNT(*) > 50;
CREATE TABLE temp_results AS SELECT id, toLastDayOfWeek(event_date) AS week_end, value / (CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE value END) AS safe_value FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT week_end, SUM(safe_value) AS aggregated_value FROM temp_results GROUP BY week_end HAVING aggregated_value > 100 ORDER BY week_end;
